entries.title: Knowledge Corpus
entries.summary: This folder is the citation-grounded source material for The GRC Companion.

entries.title: Case Studies
entries.summary: Case studies ground abstract GRC engineering concepts in practical examples.

entries.title: Example: Automated SOC 2 Document Parsing
entries.summary: **Scenario:** Employed TPRM Lead automates vendor document review to save time

entries.title: GRC Baseline Context - SOC 2 Parsing Example
entries.summary: *This is the actual baseline context the learner submitted to generate their personalized lab.*

entries.title: User Prompt - SOC 2 Parsing Example
entries.summary: *This is the exact prompt the learner submitted (after filling out their baseline context) that generated the 12-week learning lab.*

entries.title: Framework References
entries.summary: Framework material belongs here only when it supports learning.

entries.title: Control
entries.summary: A control is a designed way to prevent, detect, correct, or govern a risk.

entries.title: Evidence
entries.summary: Evidence is proof that a control, process, or decision happened in the real operating system.

entries.title: LinkedIn Corpus
entries.summary: Structured LinkedIn posts belong here after ingestion from the existing JSONL source.

entries.title: Deep-Dive Research: Best Practices for Showcasing Prompt Generators & Learning Tools
entries.summary: **Research Date:** October 31, 2025 **Purpose:** Identify proven strategies to demonstrate the GRC Lab Builder's value without requiring users to test it themselves **Sources Analyzed:** 20+ tools across prompt generators, learning platforms, SaaS demos, and template galleries
